title: Fluffy Tapioca Pudding
instructions: Mix tapioca, salt, 3 tbsp. sugar, milk and egg yolk in heavy saucepan (or use double boiler).
Gradually beat in 2 tbsp. sugar, beating to soft peaks.
Set aside the beaten egg white.
Cook tapioca mixture over medium heat to a full boil, stirring constantly.
Remove from heat as soon as mixture reaches full boiling point.
Gradually add the hot tapioca mixture to the beaten egg white, stirring quickly just until blended.
Serve warm or chilled with freshly whipped, lightly sweetened cream.
notes: This is my ultimate comfort food – as a child and now!
I always triple or quadruple the recipe.
Can be served warm or chilled
